title: Instruction Pair (SFT, strict)
description: Strict variant of instruction_pair.schema.json — identical shape except `content_type` must be a member of the ChunkType enum from schemas/taxonomies/content_type.json. REC-VOC-03 Phase 2. Gated at runtime by TRAINFORGE_ENFORCE_CONTENT_TYPE=true; the default (lenient) schema is preserved at instruction_pair.schema.json for backward-compat with free-string consumers.

prompt.description: The instruction a model must answer. Must not contain a verbatim span of 50+ consecutive characters from the source chunk text.

completion.description: The target completion the model should produce.

chunk_id.description: Source chunk id from imscc_chunks/chunks.jsonl (Phase 7c rename of corpus/chunks.jsonl, e.g. sample_course_chunk_00042).

lo_refs.description: Learning-outcome refs the source chunk maps to. Never empty: chunks without LO refs do not generate pairs.

content_type.description: Content-type label from the source chunk. Must be a member of the ChunkType enum defined in schemas/taxonomies/content_type.json#/$defs/ChunkType. Wave 81 added the four template-driven values (procedure, real_world_scenario, common_pitfall, problem_solution) propagated from Courseforge data-cf-template-type. Enforced by lib.validators.content_type when TRAINFORGE_ENFORCE_CONTENT_TYPE=true.

seed.description: Seed used for deterministic template selection and sampling. Same chunk + same seed -> identical pair.

decision_capture_id.description: event_id from the decision-capture log that records why this pair was synthesized. Resolves against the run's decisions JSONL.

template_id.description: Id of the prompt template used (bloom-level x content-type). Optional but useful for debugging.

provider.description: Which synthesis provider produced the pair.
